title: Delightful
description: Configurable Farmer's Delight addon with compat features and immersive new foods.
body:
![](https://onvoid.net/delightful/banner.png) ### Every new feature can be disabled in the config. This description mainly reflects the latest mod version.
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brdle/Delightful/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/delightful/textures/item/smore.png) Foods:

- **Marshmallow on a Stick** - **Roasted Marshmallow on a Stick** - **S'more** (recommended with Neapolitan or Create chocolate) - **Cheeseburger** - **Deluxe Cheeseburger** - **Jelly Bottle** - **Glow Jelly Bottle** (Glowing effect) - **Nut Butter Bottle Nut Butter Bottle** - **Nut Butter and Jelly Sandwich** - **Ender Nectar** (single-use Ender Chest access) - **Cactus Flesh** - **Cactus Steak** - **Field Salad** - **Acorn** (nut that drops from Oak Leaves) - **Raw Goat** (drops from Goats) - **Cooked Goat** - **Raw Venison Chops** (for "forge:raw_venison", recommended with Naturalist) - **Cooked Venison Chops** - **Cantaloupe Slice** ### Pumpkin Pie Overhaul (configurable)
You can now place a vanilla Pumpkin Pie in world like a Farmer's Delight's pie!
Cut the pie to obtain a Slice of Pumpkin Pie, or just Right Click to eat.
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brdle/Delightful/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/delightful/textures/item/enderite_knife.png) Knives:

Each new knife will only be enabled if its specific crafting material is found (or its dependent mod is loaded for some).
Knives can be disabled/enabled again in the config at "config/delightful-common.toml". Disabled by default: - **Copper Knife** (recommended with Copperized) - **Bone Knife** (recommended with Bone Equipment) - **Amethyst Knife** (recommended with Amethyst Equipment) - **Emerald Knife** (recommended with Emerald Equipment) **Compat Knives** (tag): - **Tin Knife** (forge:ingots/tin) - **Steel Knife** (forge:ingots/steel) - **Bronze Knife** (forge:ingots/bronze) - **Silver Knife** (forge:ingots/silver) - **Brass Knife** (forge:ingots/brass) - **Enderite Knife** (forge:ingots/enderite) - **Black Opal Knife** (forge:gems/black_opal) - **Constantan Knife** (forge:ingots/constantan) - **Electrum Knife** (forge:ingots/electrum) - **Invar Knife** (forge:ingots/invar) - **Lead Knife** (forge:ingots/lead) - **Nickel Knife** (forge:ingots/nickel) For [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest): - **Fiery Knife** - **Ironwood Knife** - **Knightmetal Knife** - **Steeleaf Knife** For Mekanism Tools: - **Osmium Knife** - **Lapis Lazuli Knife** - **Refined Glowstone Knife** - **Refined Obsidian Knife** For Forbidden and Arcanus: - **Deorum Knife** - **Reinforced Deorum Knife** - **Draco Arcanus Knife** For SimpleOres: - **Adamantium Knife** - **Mythril Knife** - **Onyx Knife** For Fusion: - **Thyrium Knife** - **Sinisite Knife** For Ores Above Diamonds: - **Amethyst Knife** - **Netherite Opal Knife** For Oh The Biomes You'll Go: - **Pendorite Knife** For Roots Classic: - **Living Knife** For Allthemodium: - **Allthemodium Knife** For LieOnLion's Enderite: - **Obsidian-Infused Enderite Knife**
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brdle/Delightful/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/delightful/textures/item/salmonberries.png) Salmonberries:

**Salmonberries** are a delicious new berry that spawn in Forests.
They are useful for an on-the-go snack, or in recipes that require berries such as the **Berry Matcha Latte**.
They are a special ingredient for **Salmonberry Pie** (which can be sliced) and **Salmonberry Ice Cream** (recommended with Neapolitan)
The berries can be crafted into **Salmonberry Pips** and planted (inspired by/compat for Berry Good).
The **Salmonberry Sack** is a storage and decoration block for your berries (inspired by Quark).
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brdle/Delightful/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/delightful/textures/item/matcha.png) Matcha:

A Green Tea Leaf can be acquired by using a Knife on Leaves blocks (by chance). The Green Tea Leaves from Farmer's Respite are also compatible.
The leaf can be crafted into Matcha, a concentrated tea powder. This can then be used in two delicious lattes;
- **Matcha Latte** (Provides health, food, and comfort) - **Berry Matcha Latte** (Provides health, food, and comfort) - **Matcha Ice Cream** (Provides food and comfort, recommended with Neapolitan)
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/brdle/Delightful/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/delightful/textures/item/animal_fat.png) Fat & Oil:

**Animal Fat** will be dropped by chance from any "fatty" animal (tagged under "delightful:fatty_animals"), with some compat support included.
The fat can be cooked into **Animal Oil Bottle**s, which are a Furnace fuel with a special ability: a simple Sneak Right Click will refuel the Furnace instantly.
Blocks:

- **Acorn Sack** - **Mini Melon** (spawns in Plains) - **Cantaloupe** (spawns on Beaches) - **Quartz Cabinet** - **Basalt Cabinet**
For Oh The Biomes You'll Go:

### Pie Overhaul (disable any slice item to turn off):
You can now place any Oh The Biomes You'll Go pie in world like a Farmer's Delight pie!
Cut the pie to obtain a **Slice of Pie**, or just Right Click to eat. The pie will give the same potion effect as it did before.
For Ars Nouveau:

### Source Berry Pie Overhaul (disable slice item to turn off):
You can now place an Ars Nouveau **Source Berry Pie** in world like a Farmer's Delight pie!
Cut the pie to obtain a **Slice of Source Berry Pie**, or just Right Click to eat. The pie will give the same potion effect as it did before.
For Biomes O' Plenty:

- **Chopped Clover** - **Rock Candy** - **Lavender Tea**
For Ecologics:

- **Crab Rangoon** - **Honey Glazed Walnut** - **Prickly Pear Juice** - **Azalea Tea**
For Rotten Leather:

- **Chunkwich** - **Chunk Nugget**
